output: MATCH (b:vt_bacnt)-[r1:has_account]->(p:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'}), (p:vt_psn)-[r2:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno) RETURN b, r1, p, r2, t LIMIT 30
MATCH (b:vt_bacnt)-[r1:has_account]->(p:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'}), (p:vt_psn)-[r2:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno) RETURN b, r1, p, r2, t LIMIT 30
MATCH (b:vt_bacnt)-[r1:has_account]->(p:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'}), (p:vt_psn)-[r2:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno) RETURN b, r1, p, r2, t LIMIT 30
MATCH (p:vt_psn {name: '피해자1'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[r1:has_account]->(b:vt_bacnt) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[r2:owns_phone]->(t:vt_telno) RETURN p, r1, b, r2, t LIMIT 30
MATCH (n) WHERE n.telno = '110-1111-1111' OR n.actno = '110-1111-1111' RETURN n LIMIT 30
